content.json:
# Syslog Monitoring & Hunting
**MITRE ATT&CK:** T1078 Valid Accounts · T1499 Endpoint DoS · T1562 Impair Defenses

**Data source:** `Syslog` (Linux / network appliances via AMA). Use this to baseline normal facility/severity volume and surface error bursts and auth failures.

> Establish a per-host baseline before alerting on volume spikes.

content.query: Syslog | summarize Events=count() by Facility, SeverityLevel | sort by Events desc
content.title: Events by facility & severity

content.query: Syslog | summarize Events=count() by bin(TimeGenerated,1h), SeverityLevel | render timechart
content.title: Volume over time by severity

content.query: Syslog | where SeverityLevel in ('err','crit','alert','emerg') | summarize Count=count() by Computer, ProcessName | top 100 by Count desc
content.title: Error / critical events by host & process

content.query: Syslog | where SyslogMessage has_any ('authentication failure','Failed password','invalid user','sudo:','session opened for user root') | summarize Count=count() by Computer, ProcessName, SyslogMessage | top 100 by Count desc
content.title: Authentication / sudo activity — T1078
